variants._comment:: ($self$) 申请成为劲敌 口上文
($self$) 拒绝成为劲敌 口上文
($self$) 被拒绝成为劲敌 口上文
($self$) 劲敌关系破裂 口上文

zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_1: $self$抱着手臂走到$target$面前，下巴微微扬起。"既然我们的目标一致，那就比比看谁更有资格站在那个顶峰吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_2: $self$没有多余的废话，直接将战书扔在桌上。"我不喜欢拖泥带水。从现在开始，你就是我要跨越的障碍。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_3: $self$冷冷地瞥了$target$一眼，语气中带着几分挑衅。"我不认为你会是我的对手，但我不介意那个证明的过程。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_4: $self$整理了一下衣领，神情变得严肃而锐利。"这种过家家的游戏结束了。接下来，我会全力以赴击溃你。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_5: $self$用一种评估商品的眼神上下打量着$target$。"希望你能坚持得久一点，别太快让我觉得无聊。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_6: $self$背对着$target$挥了挥手。"赛场上见。别指望我会手下留情。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_7: $self$眼里闪烁着兴奋的光芒，用力拍了拍$target$的肩膀。"嘿！我们来比一场吧！输的人要请客哦！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_8: $self$嘴角勾起一抹自信的弧度，向$target$伸出了拳头。"虽然我们是朋友，但在这一点上我可是绝不会让步的。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_9: $self$深吸一口气，认真地注视着$target$的双眼。"正因为认可你，所以我才想赢过你。接招吧！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_10: $self$有些不好意思地挠了挠脸颊，但眼神却格外坚定。"那个……虽然有点突然，但我不想输给你。不管是哪方面！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_11: $self$像是在宣布什么大事一样，双手叉腰站在$target$面前。"我也要燃起来了！$target$，做好觉悟吧！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_propose_12: $self$调皮地对$target$做了个鬼脸。"如果不拿出真本事的话，可是会被我远远甩在身后的哦？"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_1: $self$轻哼一声，转身离去。"很好，那就走着瞧。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_2: $self$没有什么特别的反应，只是微微点了点头。"明智的选择。后果自负。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_3: $self$嘴角露出一丝不易察觉的冷笑。"那就让我看看你的斤两吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_4: $self$收起了之前的漫不经心，眼神变得像刀锋一样锐利。"正如我所愿。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_5: $self$没有再看$target$一眼，径直走向了自己的位置。"别后悔就行。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_7: $self$高兴地跳了起来，在这个瞬间完全不像是要对决的对手。"太棒了！我就知道你会答应！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_8: $self$用力握住了$target$的手，眼中燃烧着斗志。"让我们来一场精彩的对决吧！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_9: $self$吹了一声口哨，显得干劲十足。"好耶！这下更有动力了！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_10: $self$笑得有些狡黠，向$target$比了个V字手势。"那说好了哦，谁也不许放水！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_11: $self$满意地点点头，像是找到了心仪的玩伴。"这才像话嘛！我会把你打得落花流水的！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_set_12: $self$碰了碰$target$的拳头。"一定要全力以赴啊，我最强的对手！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_1: $self$像是听到了什么笑话一样，发出了一声嗤笑。"和你比？别开玩笑了。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_2: $self$连头都没有抬，继续做着手里的事。"我没兴趣陪你玩这种无聊的游戏。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_3: $self$一脸厌烦地挥了挥手，像是驱赶苍蝇一样。"别来烦我，我很忙。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_4: $self$上下打量了$target$一番，摇了摇头。"现在的你，还没有资格做我的对手。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_5: $self$冷漠地转过身去。"这种毫无意义的争斗，我不参与。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_6: $self$叹了口气，眼神中充满了失望。"找别人去吧，你的水平太低了。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_7: $self$有些为难地摆着手，脸上带着歉意的笑。"啊哈哈……这种事情还是算了吧，我不擅长争斗啦。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_8: $self$轻轻推了推$target$的胳膊，试图缓和气氛。"哎呀，为什么要搞得这么严肃嘛？大家一起开心不好吗？"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_9: $self$有些担忧地看着$target$。"我不想因为这种事破坏我们的关系……"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_10: $self$把头摇得像拨浪鼓一样。"不行不行！我要是赢了你会哭鼻子的！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_11: $self$嘟起嘴，显得有些不情愿。"还是做队友比较好吧？我不喜欢和你对着干。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refuse_12: $self$笑着把话题岔开了。"比起这个，我们还是一起去吃点好吃的吧！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_1: $self$眯起眼睛，脸上闪过一丝不悦。"懦夫。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_2: $self$耸了耸肩，一副无所谓的样子。"随你便。反正结果不会改变。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_3: $self$冷冷地看着$target$，眼中透着鄙夷。"这就是你的回答吗？令人失望。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_4: $self$没有说话，只是用一种看失败者的眼神注视了$target$几秒，然后转身离开。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_5: $self$发出了一声轻蔑的鼻音。"怕了吗？那就滚远点。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_6: $self$面无表情地收回了视线。"浪费我的时间。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_7: $self$有些失落地垂下了肩膀。"诶——？怎么这样……真没劲。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_8: $self$不甘心地咬着嘴唇，盯着$target$看。"真的不行吗？就试一次嘛！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_9: $self$像是泄了气的皮球一样趴在桌子上。"小气鬼$target$！明明是个好机会的说……"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_10: $self$鼓着腮帮子，有些生气地别过头去。"哼，不比就不比。胆小鬼！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_11: $self$叹了口气，无奈地摊开双手。"好吧好吧，看来你是真的不想输给我。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_refused_12: $self$有些遗憾地看着自己的手心。"明明我还特意准备了很久呢……"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_1: $self$疲惫地揉了揉太阳穴。"够了。这种无休止的争斗没有任何意义。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_2: $self$将相关的资料全部扔进了垃圾桶。"我退出了。你可以独享那所谓的胜利了。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_3: $self$面无表情地看着$target$，眼神中再无波澜。"以后别再提这件事了。我们还是保持距离比较好。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_4: $self$冷淡地收拾着自己的东西。"看来我们确实合不来。到此为止吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_5: $self$转身离开，只留下一个决绝的背影。"这场闹剧结束了。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_6: $self$语气平淡，仿佛在说别人的事。"我不玩了。这种竞争让我感到恶心。"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_7: $self$长舒了一口气，脸上重新露出了轻松的笑容。"呼——累死我了！还是不要做对手了，太伤神啦！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_8: $self$主动伸出手，想要和$target$握手言和。"无论是输是赢都无所谓了，我们还是做回好朋友吧！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_9: $self$有些不好意思地挠了挠头。"刚才是不是太较真了？抱歉抱歉，忘掉那些吧！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_10: $self$走过去给了$target$一个大大的拥抱。"比起赢过你，我还是更喜欢支持你！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_11: $self$笑着拍了拍$target$的背。"竞争解除！以后还是互帮互助比较适合我们！"
zh-cn.relationship_rival_break_12: $self$把之前的赌注一笔勾销。"不算数不算数！我们重新开始做搭档吧！"

en-us.relationship_rival_propose_1: $self$ crosses her arms and walks up to $target$, chin tilted slightly upward. "Since we share the same goal, let's see who's more qualified to stand at the top."
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_2: $self$ tosses the challenge onto the table without wasting words. "I don't like dragging things out. From now on, you are the obstacle I must overcome."
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_3: $self$ gives $target$ a cold glance, her tone laced with provocation. "I don't think you're a match for me, but I don't mind the process of proving it."
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_4: $self$ adjusts her collar, her expression turning serious and sharp. "This childish game is over. From here on out, I'm going all in to crush you."
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_5: $self$ looks $target$ up and down, like assessing a piece of merchandise. "Hope you can last a while. Don't bore me too quickly."
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_6: $self$ waves without turning back to face $target$. "See you in the arena. Don't expect any mercy from me."
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_7: $self$ slaps $target$ on the shoulder, excitement sparkling in her eyes. "Hey! Let's have a contest! Loser has to treat the winner!"
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_8: $self$ smirks confidently, extending a fist toward $target$. "We may be friends, but I won't give an inch on this."
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_9: $self$ takes a deep breath and looks straight into $target$'s eyes earnestly. "It's because I acknowledge you that I want to beat you. Bring it on!"
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_10: $self$ scratches her cheek shyly, but her eyes are determined. "Umm... this might be sudden, but I don't want to lose to you. In anything!"
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_11: $self$ stands before $target$ with hands on hips, as if announcing something huge. "I'm getting fired up too! $target$, prepare yourself!"
en-us.relationship_rival_propose_12: $self$ sticks her tongue out at $target$ playfully. "If you don't get serious, I'm gonna leave you in the dust, you know?"
en-us.relationship_rival_set_1: $self$ scoffs lightly and turns to leave. "Fine. We'll see about that."
en-us.relationship_rival_set_2: $self$ shows little reaction, simply nodding slightly. "A wise choice. You'll deal with the consequences."
en-us.relationship_rival_set_3: $self$ reveals a faint, barely noticeable sneer. "Let's see what you're made of then."
en-us.relationship_rival_set_4: $self$ drops her casual attitude, her gaze turning razor-sharp. "Just as I wished."
en-us.relationship_rival_set_5: $self$ heads straight for her spot without looking back at $target$. "Just don't regret it."
en-us.relationship_rival_set_7: $self$ jumps up in joy, looking nothing like a rival in that moment. "Awesome! I knew you'd say yes!"
en-us.relationship_rival_set_8: $self$ grips $target$'s hand firmly, fighting spirit burning in her eyes. "Let's have a great match!"
en-us.relationship_rival_set_9: $self$ whistles, looking all fired up. "Heck yeah! Now I'm even more motivated!"
en-us.relationship_rival_set_10: $self$ flashes a cunning smile and gives $target$ a peace sign. "It's a promise then—no holding back!"
en-us.relationship_rival_set_11: $self$ nods with satisfaction, like she found the perfect playmate. "That's what I'm talking about! I'm gonna beat you fair and square!"
en-us.relationship_rival_set_12: $self$ bumps fists with $target$. "You better give it your all, my greatest rival!"
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_1: $self$ snorts as if she heard a joke. "Compete with you? You're kidding."
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_2: $self$ doesn't even look up, continuing her work. "I have no interest in playing silly games with you."
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_3: $self$ waves her hand in annoyance, like shooing a fly. "Don't bother me. I'm busy."
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_4: $self$ looks $target$ up and down and shakes her head. "You're not qualified to be my opponent yet."
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_5: $self$ turns her back coldly. "I won't take part in such meaningless strife."
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_6: $self$ sighs, eyes filled with disappointment. "Go find someone else. Your level is too low."
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_7: $self$ waves her hands awkwardly, an apologetic smile on her face. "Ahaha... let's not do that. I'm not really good at fighting."
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_8: $self$ nudges $target$'s arm gently, trying to lighten the mood. "Oh, come on, why so serious? Can't we just have fun together?"
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_9: $self$ looks at $target$ with concern. "I don't want to ruin our relationship over something like this..."
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_10: $self$ shakes her head vigorously. "No, no! If I win, you'll just cry about it!"
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_11: $self$ pouts, looking reluctant. "Isn't it better to be teammates? I don't like going against you."
en-us.relationship_rival_refuse_12: $self$ laughs and changes the subject. "More importantly, let's go get something good to eat!"
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_1: $self$ narrows her eyes, a flash of displeasure crossing her face. "Coward."
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_2: $self$ shrugs, acting indifferent. "Suit yourself. The outcome won't change anyway."
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_3: $self$ stares coldly at $target$ with disdain. "That's your answer? Disappointing."
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_4: $self$ stays silent, looking at $target$ like a loser for a few seconds before turning away.
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_6: $self$ withdraws her gaze expressionlessly. "Waste of my time."
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_7: $self$ shoulders slump in disappointment. "Ehh—? Why...? That's so boring."
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_8: $self$ bites her lip unhappily, staring at $target$. "Really? Just try it once!"
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_9: $self$ slumps onto the table like a deflated balloon. "Stingy $target$! And here I thought it was a good chance..."
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_10: $self$ puffs out her cheeks and looks away angrily. "Hmph. Fine, we won't compete. Chicken!"
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_11: $self$ sighs and spreads her hands helplessly. "Okay, okay. Looks like you really don't want to lose to me."
en-us.relationship_rival_refused_12: $self$ looks at her palm with regret. "And I even prepared for this for so long..."
en-us.relationship_rival_break_1: $self$ rubs her temples wearily. "Enough. This endless fighting is meaningless."
en-us.relationship_rival_break_2: $self$ throws all related documents into the trash. "I'm out. You can keep that so-called victory to yourself."
en-us.relationship_rival_break_3: $self$ looks at $target$ expressionlessly, eyes devoid of emotion. "Don't bring this up again. We're better off keeping our distance."
en-us.relationship_rival_break_4: $self$ packs her things coldly. "Seems we really don't get along. This ends here."
en-us.relationship_rival_break_5: $self$ turns to leave, showing only a resolute back. "This farce is over."
en-us.relationship_rival_break_6: $self$ speaks flatly, as if talking about someone else. "I'm done playing. This competition makes me sick."
en-us.relationship_rival_break_7: $self$ lets out a long sigh, a relaxed smile returning to her face. "Phew—I'm exhausted! Let's stop being rivals, it's too draining!"
en-us.relationship_rival_break_8: $self$ reaches out, wanting to shake hands with $target$. "Win or lose, it doesn't matter anymore. Let's go back to being good friends!"
en-us.relationship_rival_break_9: $self$ scratches her head sheepishly. "Was I too serious earlier? Sorry, sorry, let's forget all that!"
en-us.relationship_rival_break_10: $self$ goes over and gives $target$ a big hug. "I'd rather support you than beat you!"
en-us.relationship_rival_break_11: $self$ pats $target$ on the back with a laugh. "Rivalry cancelled! Helping each other suits us better!"
en-us.relationship_rival_break_12: $self$ writes off the previous bet. "Doesn't count! Let's start over as partners!"
